revision.comment: +[[Category:分野別に分類したカテゴリ]]
+定義文・ソートキー調整
revision.text:
分野別に分類した[[記事]]のカテゴリ。
[[Category:一覧|*きし]] [[Category:分野別に分類したカテゴリ|*きし]]

revision.comment: [[Template:Pathnav]]
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|総記|一覧}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|総記|カテゴリ関連|カテゴリを集めたカテゴリ|カテゴリを集めたカテゴリ (分類指標別)|分野別に分類したカテゴリ}}
'''分野別の[[記事]]'''に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:ふんやへつのきし}} [[Category:一覧|*きし]] [[Category:分野別に分類したカテゴリ|*きし]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|総記|一覧}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|総記|カテゴリ関連|カテゴリを集めたカテゴリ|カテゴリを集めたカテゴリ (分類指標別)|分野別に分類したカテゴリ}}
'''分野別の[[記事]]'''に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:ふんやへつのきし}} [[Category:一覧]] [[Category:分野別に分類したカテゴリ|*きし]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]

(2025-05-16T00:23:25Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:天文学に関する記事]].
[[ja:Category:分野別の記事]]
{{translated page|ja|分野別の記事|2=Category:分野別の記事|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Categories by field]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:分野別の記事]] to [[Category:Articles by field]]: Merge [[Category:分野別の記事]] into [[Category:Articles by field]] via bot
Removing from [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

revision.comment: Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9576401)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|指標別分類|分野別}}
}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:分野別の記事|version=85413789}}
{{translated page|ja|分野別の記事|2=Category:分野別の記事|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{wikidata link|Q9576401}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:分野別の記事]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:天文学に関する記事]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:天文学に関する記事]]

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
